# Pull Request

Provide a short description of the change and why it was made.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Sensor integration
- [ ] Logging or data format update
- [ ] Mapping / visualization update
- [ ] Hardware-related improvement

## Testing

Describe the testing completed for this change.

- [ ] Code compiles successfully
- [ ] Tested in relevant environment
- [ ] Serial output checked
- [ ] Logged data reviewed
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed

## Notes for Reviewers

Add any context, constraints, limitations, or areas that need special attention.
